best_practices: Monthly active user tracking with cohort segmentation
Cohort retention analysis by acquisition channel
Customer success playbooks triggered by health score drops
In-app onboarding checklists with completion tracking
Usage-based upgrade prompts when users hit plan limits
Annual billing discount (typically 15–20%) to reduce churn exposure
NPS survey triggered 30 days after activation
common_risks: Feature bloat reducing activation rates for new users
Support ticket volume growing faster than revenue
Enterprise security requirements blocking deals (SOC2, SSO)
Single-person accounts with no expansion path
Free tier abuse consuming disproportionate infrastructure cost
growth_patterns: Product-led growth (PLG) — free tier with in-product upgrade moments
Free tier + upgrade funnel via feature gates
Annual billing discount to reduce monthly churn exposure
Usage-based pricing to align cost with customer value
Viral loops via collaboration features or public-facing outputs
recommended_integrations: Intercom — in-app support and customer success messaging
Mixpanel — funnel analysis and retention cohorts
PostHog — self-hosted product analytics and feature flags
Resend — transactional emails (welcome, trial ending, payment failed)
Linear — product roadmap and sprint planning
activation_events: User creates their first core object (project, workspace, form, etc.)
churn_warning_signals: Support ticket opened in last 7 days
Payment failed or dunning email sent
